Job Post Details

Backend Developer – C# / .NET - job post

IMA Schelling Group
3.83.8 out of 5 stars
Hyderabad, Telangana•Hybrid work
You must create an Indeed account before continuing to the company website to apply

Location

Hyderabad, Telangana•Hybrid work
&nbsp;

Benefits

Pulled from the full job description

  • Flexible schedule
&nbsp;

Full job description

We are bold and innovative, curious and creative, down-to-earth, and clearly focused on the success of our customers. Our ideas and expertise shape unique machinery and plant solutions for international companies in the wood, metal, and plastic processing industries. From the most well-known furniture brands to the world's largest aircraft manufacturer or the skilled local carpenter, clients rely on our experience. Some of our systems reach the size of up to two football fields—possible because we bring over 100 years of pioneering work at the highest level. Ambitious young professionals, specialists, and executives will find the perfect environment for their talents with us. Are you in?

We offer

  • Part of Innovation: Embrace exciting challenges in high-tech custom machine engineering and actively contribute to success with your ideas.

  • Growth-Oriented Approach: Take advantage of ongoing training, workshops, and a well-structured career development path.

  • Flexible Work Options: Benefit from flexible working hours and remote work options to optimally balance your career and personal life.

  • Team-Oriented Company Culture: Work in a supportive team environment focused on collaboration and shared success.

  • Open, Friendly Culture: We foster a transparent work environment where everyone communicates on a first-name basis.

Your responsibilities

  • Design, develop and integrate high-quality software solutions that ensure reliable, scalable, and future-ready IT services and products.

  • Collaborate with cross-functional Agile teams to deliver innovative solutions that exceed customer expectations and drive continuous improvement.

  • Work closely with the PO during backlog refinement and planning sessions to analyze and clarify business requirements into well-defined technical solutions

  • Take ownership of the complete software development lifecycle

  • You contribute beyond coding to areas such as software architecture, code quality, testing, deployment, and operational excellence.

  • Learn and use software engineering best practices to build secure, maintainable and high-performing applications.

  • Continuously evaluate and adopt new technologies, tools and development practices to improve product quality and team productivity.

Your profile

  • You have a bachelor´s or master´s degree in computer engineering, computer science, or a related technical field

  • Minimum of 5+ years of hands-on-experience in software development using C# / .NET

  • Experience working with MongoDB is an added advantage

  • Strong experience in designing, developing and consuming RESTful web services and APIs using modern standards such as OpenAPI/Swagger

  • Good understanding of Agile development methodologies, particularly Scrum

  • Experience with microservices architecture, Docker and CI/CD pipelines using Azure DevOps is a plus

  • Strong analytical and problem-solving abilities with excellent communication and collaboration skills

  • Passion for learning and working with new technologies in a fast-paced environment

  • Excellent written and verbal communication skills in English an mandatory
